title: Dragon Rage destroys all magic after negation

card.rawText: When your opponent plays a magic card or lands an attack, negate the attack/magic card effect, and destroy all magic cards on the field. Both players then draw 3 cards.

plan.title: Dragon Rage destroys all magic after negation
plan.summary: After Dragon Rage negates a triggering effect, verify all magic cards on field are destroyed as the next resolution step.

notes: Pre-place Demonic Magic and Dragon’s Bane on field before player_2 plays Dragon Fire.
Player 1 has Dragon Rage as Lightning response.

steps: Resolve Dragon Rage negation, then its destroy-all-magic step.
Inspect active magic slots and cemeteries before draw step if possible.
manualVerification: Confirm Dragon Rage destruction occurs after negation and before draw 3.
Confirm all magic includes Infinite, Field, Equip, Standard, and Lightning as applicable on field/chain per engine timing.
riskNotes: Timing of resolving Lightning card entering cemetery versus field destruction may vary by engine implementation.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Supported destroy resolver, but chained after-negation timing needs validation.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The LLM only proposes the fixture. The deterministic engine and manual QA status remain source of truth.
